e1_sentence: Narrated Imran ibn Husayn:  A woman belonging to the tribe of Juhaynah (according to the version of Aban)  came to the Prophet (peace be upon him) and said that she had committed  fornication and that she was pregnant
e2_sentence: He said: "By Him  in Whose hand my soul is, she has repented to such an extent that if it were  divided among the seventy people of Medina, it would have been enough for them  all
